name: kickstart
description: AI-guided onboarding for deploying apps to AKS

scripts.build: npm run clean --workspaces --if-present && npm run build -w @kickstart/harness && npm run build -w @kickstart/pack-core -w @kickstart/pack-azure -w @kickstart/pack-aks-automatic -w @kickstart/pack-github && npm run build -w @kickstart/mcp-server && npm run build -w @kickstart/web && npm run build -w @kickstart/api
scripts.api:build: npm run build -w @kickstart/harness && npm run build -w @kickstart/api
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @kickstart/harness && npm run build -w @kickstart/api && concurrently -n vite,func,swa -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:vite" "npm run dev:func" "npm run dev:swa"
